nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: Ah... you're awake at last. The Sap brought you here — I could feel its pull the moment you arrived.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: This is the Verdant Grove. The three streams of Sap — Blue, Crimson, and Silver — flow through everything here. They cycle endlessly, shaping the world.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: But something has gone wrong. The forest creatures have turned hostile. They attack anyone who draws near.

choices.text: I'll help. What do I need to do?
Why should I care about your problems?
Tell me more about the Sap Cycle first.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: Good heart you have. Defeat three of the Forest Guardians that roam the grove. Return to me when it's done.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: Because the Sap chose you, child. Whether you like it or not, your fate is bound to this land. Help us, and perhaps we can help you find your way home.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: The Sap flows in three phases. Blue brings clarity and arcane power. Crimson ignites fury and raw strength. Silver unveils mystery and hidden truths. Your spells resonate differently with each phase.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: You've proven yourself capable. The Grove is safer thanks to you.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: Take these healing potions — you'll need them. And listen... something darker stirs in the Crystal Caverns. Shadow creatures are emerging.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: When you're ready, venture east to the caverns. But be careful — the shadows are unlike anything in this grove.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: The Crystal Caverns lie to the northeast. The shadows there feed on the Silver phase of the Sap Cycle.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: Use Azure Bolt during the Blue phase — it will be at its strongest against them. Collect the Shadow Essence they drop. We may need it.

nodes.speaker: herbalist
nodes.text: Oh, a traveler! Perfect timing. I'm running low on supplies and these woods have become too dangerous for me.

nodes.speaker: herbalist
nodes.text: Could you bring me 2 Health Potions? The forest creatures sometimes carry them. I'll make it worth your while!

choices.text: Sure, I'll keep an eye out.

nodes.speaker: herbalist
nodes.text: Thank you! I'll be right here when you've gathered them.

nodes.speaker: herbalist
nodes.text: No worries! Come back if you change your mind.

nodes.speaker: scholar
nodes.text: Fascinating... the readings indicate a surge of sap energy from the Sunken Ruins to the south.

nodes.speaker: scholar
nodes.text: I'd investigate myself, but I'm more of a... theoretical type. Would you explore the ruins and deal with any hostiles?

nodes.speaker: scholar
nodes.text: Excellent! The ruins are southeast of here. Be careful of the fog — it plays tricks on the mind.

nodes.speaker: scholar
nodes.text: Understandable. Science can wait... I suppose.

nodes.speaker: merchant
nodes.text: Welcome, welcome! Orla's the name, trade's the game. What can I do for you today?

nodes.speaker: merchant
nodes.text: I've got potions, crystals, and the occasional piece of equipment. Take a look!

nodes.speaker: merchant
nodes.text: Word is the Crimson Wardens on the plateau have gone completely mad. Something about the Sap corrupting them. Best stay clear unless you're looking for trouble.

nodes.speaker: merchant
nodes.text: If you ARE heading that way, might want to stock up on potions first. Just saying!

choices.text: Good idea. Show me your wares.

nodes.speaker: merchant
nodes.text: Safe travels! Come back anytime.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: The Crimson phase grows stronger each cycle. I feared this day would come.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: The Wardens on the Crimson Plateau were once protectors, like the Forest Guardians. But the Sap has twisted them — filled them with rage beyond reason.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: You must go to the plateau and end their suffering. Collect the Crimson Shards they carry — we'll need them to understand what went wrong.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: The Wardens have been put to rest. You've done a difficult thing today.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: These Crimson Shards... the energy inside them is immense. The corruption isn't random — something at the Nexus Spire is pulling the Sap out of balance.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: Take this helm — the Wardens would want it used for good. When you are strong enough, the Nexus Spire awaits. All three streams of Sap converge there.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: So... you're ready. The Nexus Spire is where Blue, Crimson, and Silver converge into one. It is the heart of everything.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: Whatever has been corrupting the Sap — twisting Guardians, maddening Wardens, spawning Shadows — it all leads there.

choices.text: I'm ready. Tell me what to expect.
I need to prepare more first.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: Every phase of the Sap will be in flux there. Master them all — use Blue for precision, Crimson for power, Silver for endurance. This is the final test.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: Wise. The Spire has waited centuries — it can wait a little longer. Return when your body and spirit are ready.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: You've done it. The Nexus Spire is cleansed. I can feel the Sap flowing true again — all three streams, in harmony.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: When you first awoke in this grove, I wondered if you were truly the one the Sap had chosen. I no longer wonder.

nodes.speaker: elder
nodes.text: The Radiant Burst spell is yours now — born of all three phases united. Use it well. This land will always need a guardian.

nodes.speaker: briara
nodes.text: Recruit. I am Commander Briara of the Bloomguard. We are the shield of the Canopy — and we could use fighters like you.

choices.text: I'd like to help the Bloomguard.
What threats does the Canopy face?

nodes.speaker: briara
nodes.text: Good. Report to the barracks when you're ready for patrol duty. We always need capable hands.

nodes.speaker: briara
nodes.text: Corruption spreads from the south. Our scouts report hollow creatures and corrupted treants. The Sap Cycle grows more volatile each day.

nodes.speaker: briara
nodes.text: The Bloomguard will be here when you change your mind. Stay safe out there.

nodes.speaker: veyla
nodes.text: Welcome, child of the Sap. I am Archdruid Veyla of the Emerald Coven. We seek to understand the ancient mysteries that bind Verdance together.

choices.text: Tell me about the Emerald Coven.

nodes.speaker: veyla
nodes.text: We are scholars, healers, and seekers of truth. The Rite of Renewal approaches — a ceremony to replenish the world's DSP. We could use an outsider's perspective.

nodes.speaker: veyla
nodes.text: The Sap holds all magic. During Blue Phase, spells cost less DSP. During Crimson, they grow fiercer but drain the world more. Learn this balance and you will thrive.

nodes.speaker: veyla
nodes.text: May the Sap guide your path.

nodes.speaker: yenna
nodes.text: The wild ones whisper of a stranger. That'd be you. I'm Yenna — the Wildkin Pact speaks through me.

nodes.speaker: yenna
nodes.text: We guard the wild balance. Not civilization — nature itself. The beasts, the trees, the rivers. When corruption stains the land, they cry out, and we answer.

nodes.speaker: yenna
nodes.text: Aye. Timber wolves growing aggressive, spore creatures multiplying... something drives them mad. The Great Hunt will cull the worst of it.

nodes.speaker: yenna
nodes.text: Watch your step. The forest doesn't forgive the careless.

nodes.speaker: althea
nodes.text: I saw you coming. In dreams, the Veilkeepers showed me your arrival. I am Althea — I See what others cannot.

choices.text: What do you See for me?

nodes.speaker: althea
nodes.text: Many paths branch before you. I see four endings — Domination, Harmony, Sacrifice, Collapse. Each choice you make narrows the possibilities. Choose wisely, for consequences echo across eras.

nodes.speaker: althea
nodes.text: Five spirits of ancient wisdom. They will answer your questions — but each consultation costs 10 DSP from the world. Ask too much, and they Hollow. Ask too little, and you may walk blind into ruin.

nodes.speaker: althea
nodes.text: Truth often is. Return when you're ready to hear more.

nodes.speaker: garon
nodes.text: Hmph. Another one who thinks a sharp blade is all they need. I'm Garon — I forge the weapons that keep this Canopy standing.

nodes.speaker: garon
nodes.text: Here. Sap-tempered steel, ironbark shields, everything a Bloomguard or Thornbinder needs. Prices are fair — I don't gouge during Crimson Phase like some.

nodes.speaker: garon
nodes.text: Bring it here. Maintenance costs half what a new piece would. I use the Bloomguard Forge — best facility in all Verdance.

nodes.speaker: garon
nodes.text: Don't wait too long. A dull blade won't save your life.

nodes.speaker: mycel
nodes.text: Don't look at me like that. The Sporecaller Syndicate isn't your enemy. Decay is merely... transformation.

nodes.speaker: mycel
nodes.text: We study the Hollowing — the corruption. Not to spread it, but to understand it. If we can harness decay, we can reverse it. The others fear what they don't understand.

nodes.speaker: mycel
nodes.text: All magic is dangerous. The Coven draws from DSP recklessly. We at least acknowledge the cost. Come to our labs — see for yourself.

nodes.speaker: mycel
nodes.text: Remember: nature doesn't judge growth and decay differently. Only people do.

nodes.speaker: borsk
nodes.text: You looking to train? I'm Borsk. Been training Bloomguard recruits for twenty years. I can teach you a thing or two about staying alive.

nodes.speaker: borsk
nodes.text: Good attitude. Remember: Action Points are everything. You get 2 per turn — 3 if you're quick enough. Positioning matters: flank your enemies for bonus damage, use cover to survive.

nodes.speaker: borsk
nodes.text: Ha! Every recruit says that right before a Hollow Knight puts them on their back. Come back when you've humbled up.

nodes.speaker: maren
nodes.text: Welcome to the Roost! Best inn in the Canopy. Need a room, a meal, or just someone to listen?

nodes.speaker: maren
nodes.text: A good rest will restore your health and recover 10 DSP for the world. The Sap heals while we sleep, you know.

nodes.speaker: maren
nodes.text: Travelers say the Hollowroot Catacombs are stirring again. And the Sporecallers have been buying strange supplies. Something's brewing...

nodes.speaker: reyla
nodes.text: Halt. Guard Captain Reyla. State your business in the Canopy.

nodes.speaker: reyla
nodes.text: Another one. Fine — keep your weapons sheathed inside city limits. If you cause trouble, the Bloomguard will handle it. If you want to help, speak to Commander Briara.

nodes.speaker: reyla
nodes.text: Go on. The guard takes all reports seriously. Corruption sightings, criminal activity, suspicious Sporecaller operations — anything helps.

nodes.speaker: merchant
nodes.text: Welcome, welcome! Merchant Lirel at your service. Finest goods from across Verdance. Potions, crystals, supplies — I have it all!

nodes.speaker: merchant
nodes.text: Of course! Prices vary with the Sap Cycle — during Crimson, everything costs 20% more. Blue Phase? Best deals you'll find anywhere.

nodes.speaker: merchant
nodes.text: Ah, a connoisseur! Check back during Silver Phase — rare enemy spawns drop rare materials, and I buy and sell them.

nodes.speaker: sentinel_ash
nodes.text: The grove is under my watch. Speak if you mean no harm.

nodes.speaker: veil_watcher
nodes.text: I watch the thin places. The Veil shifts with the Sap.

nodes.speaker: grove_tender
nodes.text: Tending the grove keeps the corruption at bay. We do what we can.

nodes.speaker: ironbark_smith
nodes.text: Ironbark and living metal. Best arms in the Canopy.

nodes.speaker: sap_weaver
nodes.text: The Sap runs through every spell. I weave it into charms.

nodes.speaker: thorn_sentinel
nodes.text: None pass the thorns without leave. State your purpose.

nodes.speaker: crystal_singer
nodes.text: The crystals hum. I sing back. You may listen, if you wish.

nodes.speaker: moss_elder
nodes.text: Slow and steady, the moss reclaims. Patience, traveller.

nodes.speaker: spore_guide
nodes.text: The spores show the path. Not all who wander are lost.

nodes.speaker: root_speaker
nodes.text: The roots remember. I speak for them when they allow.

nodes.speaker: canopy_scout
nodes.text: Scouted the high branches. Clear for now. Stay sharp.

nodes.speaker: hollow_sage
nodes.text: The Hollow holds secrets. Not all should be unearthed.

nodes.speaker: ember_guard
nodes.text: Crimson Phase burns hot. We keep the flame contained.

nodes.speaker: dew_collector
nodes.text: Morning dew carries the Sap's blessing. I collect and share it.

nodes.speaker: bark_carver
nodes.text: I carve only what the trees give. No living bark is cut.

nodes.speaker: vine_tender
nodes.text: Vines bind and protect. I tend them so they tend us.

nodes.speaker: shadow_scribe
nodes.text: I record what the shadows whisper. Some truths are best read in dim light.

nodes.speaker: bloom_herald
nodes.text: When the bloom comes, the realm renews. I herald its coming.

nodes.speaker: warden_echo
nodes.text: I am the echo of a warden who fell. I serve still.

nodes.speaker: merchant_ferren
nodes.text: Ferren's wares. Quality goods, fair prices. Charisma gets you far here.

nodes.speaker: healer_mora
nodes.text: Wounds and corruption — I treat both. The Sap guides my hands.

nodes.speaker: scout_brin
nodes.text: Scout Brin. I map the edges. Stay on the paths I mark.

nodes.speaker: keeper_lynn
nodes.text: I keep the old lore. Ask and I may share, if the time is right.

nodes.speaker: forger_del
nodes.text: Del. I forge. Bring materials and I'll make you something that lasts.

nodes.speaker: trapper_vek
nodes.text: Traps and tricks. I know the wilds. Don't wander into my lines.

nodes.speaker: singer_aria
nodes.text: I sing the old ballads. The Sap Cycle, the Unbinding — all in verse.

nodes.speaker: watcher_cole
nodes.text: I watch the borders. Something's stirring in the deep woods.
